name: TrendNow
description: Chrome extension for Google Trends scanning, rising keyword discovery, alerts, notifications, and geo-based trend tracking.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'self' https://trends.google.com https://suggestqueries.google.com;
